title: Junior Revenue Manager at Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates
company: Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates:
Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delaware North India Asia Pacific Associates!
